description: Style NoteGet your little one up and about in a pair of trousers that play as hard as he does, from gini and jony. Team this with a white tee and comfy footwear when you take him out. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while he makes the most of his fun day out with you. Product DetailsKhaki trousers with two insert pockets on the front with printed branding on the right pocket, two zippered pockets on the front legs, a patch pocket with embroidery on the left leg, two patch pockets on the back with printed branding on the left pocket and two insert pockets in the right pocket, a detachable canvas belt to hold the trousers in place, has an elasticated innerwear stitched and has a button and zip closure on the frontMaterial and Care100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery
